mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'N' ORDER BY r.review_id ASC

SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'N'
AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
ORDER BY r.view_count DESC, r.title ASC
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'N' ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.title ASC
